# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
  workflow_dispatch:

env:
  ARTIFACT_NAME: build-artifacts
  BUILD_VERSION: ${{ github.sha }}

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Application
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      artifact-name: ${{ steps.upload.outputs.artifact-name }}
      version: ${{ env.BUILD_VERSION }}
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
      
      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '18'
          cache: 'npm'
      
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci
      
      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test
      
      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build
      
      - name: Create deployment package
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist/package
          cp -r build/* dist/package/
          echo "${{ env.BUILD_VERSION }}" > dist/package/version.txt
          tar -czf application-${{ env.BUILD_VERSION }}.tar.gz -C dist/package .
      
      - name: Upload build artifacts
        id: upload
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: |
            application-${{ env.BUILD_VERSION }}.tar.gz
            dist/package/**/*
          retention-days: 30
          if-no-files-found: error

  deploy-staging:
    name: Deploy to Staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    environment:
      name: staging
      url: https://staging.example.com
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout deployment scripts
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          sparse-checkout: |
            scripts/deploy
            config/staging
      
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: ./artifacts
      
      - name: Extract artifacts
        run: |
          mkdir -p deployment
          tar -xzf artifacts/application-${{ needs.build.outputs.version }}.tar.gz -C deployment
      
      - name: Prepare deployment environment
        run: |
          chmod +x scripts/deploy/*.sh
          cp config/staging/.env.staging deployment/.env
      
      - name: Run pre-deployment checks
        run: |
          ./scripts/deploy/pre-deploy.sh staging
      
      - name: Deploy to staging server
        env:
          DEPLOY_HOST: ${{ secrets.STAGING_HOST }}
          DEPLOY_USER: ${{ secrets.STAGING_USER }}
          DEPLOY_KEY: ${{ secrets.STAGING_SSH_KEY }}
          VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.version }}
        run: |
          ./scripts/deploy/deploy.sh staging deployment
      
      - name: Run post-deployment tests
        run: |
          ./scripts/deploy/post-deploy.sh staging
      
      - name: Notify deployment status
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "Deployment to staging completed with status: ${{ job.status }}"

  deploy-production:
    name: Deploy to Production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build, deploy-staging]
    environment:
      name: production
      url: https://production.example.com
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout deployment scripts
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          sparse-checkout: |
            scripts/deploy
            config/production
      
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: ./artifacts
      
      - name: Extract artifacts
        run: |
          mkdir -p deployment
          tar -xzf artifacts/application-${{ needs.build.outputs.version }}.tar.gz -C deployment
      
      - name: Verify artifact integrity
        run: |
          echo "Verifying version: ${{ needs.build.outputs.version }}"
          cat deployment/version.txt
          
      - name: Prepare production deployment
        run: |
          chmod +x scripts/deploy/*.sh
          cp config/production/.env.production deployment/.env
      
      - name: Create backup
        env:
          BACKUP_HOST: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_HOST }}
          BACKUP_USER: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_USER }}
        run: |
          ./scripts/deploy/backup.sh production
      
      - name: Run pre-deployment checks
        run: |
          ./scripts/deploy/pre-deploy.sh production
      
      - name: Deploy to production servers
        env:
          DEPLOY_HOST: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_HOST }}
          DEPLOY_USER: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_USER }}
          DEPLOY_KEY: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY }}
          VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.version }}
        run: |
          ./scripts/deploy/deploy.sh production deployment
      
      - name: Run smoke tests
        run: |
          ./scripts/deploy/smoke-test.sh production
      
      - name: Run post-deployment validation
        run: |
          ./scripts/deploy/post-deploy.sh production
      
      - name: Update deployment tracking
        if: success()
        run: |
          echo "Production deployment successful"
          echo "Version: ${{ needs.build.outputs.version }}"
          echo "Timestamp: $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")"
      
      - name: Rollback on failure
        if: failure()
        env:
          DEPLOY_HOST: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_HOST }}
          DEPLOY_USER: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_USER }}
        run: |
          ./scripts/deploy/rollback.sh production

  deploy-dr:
    name: Deploy to Disaster Recovery
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build, deploy-production]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    environment:
      name: disaster-recovery
      url: https://dr.example.com
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout deployment scripts
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          sparse-checkout: |
            scripts/deploy
            config/dr
      
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: ./artifacts
      
      - name: Extract artifacts
        run: |
          mkdir -p deployment
          tar -xzf artifacts/application-${{ needs.build.outputs.version }}.tar.gz -C deployment
      
      - name: Prepare DR deployment
        run: |
          chmod +x scripts/deploy/*.sh
          cp config/dr/.env.dr deployment/.env
      
      - name: Sync to DR site
        env:
          DR_HOST: ${{ secrets.DR_HOST }}
          DR_USER: ${{ secrets.DR_USER }}
          DR_KEY: ${{ secrets.DR_SSH_KEY }}
          VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.version }}
        run: |
          ./scripts/deploy/deploy.sh dr deployment
      
      - name: Verify DR deployment
        run: |
          ./scripts/deploy/verify-dr.sh

  notify:
    name: Notify Deployment Status
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build, deploy-staging, deploy-production, deploy-dr]
    if: always()
    
    steps:
      - name: Download artifacts metadata
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: ./artifacts
      
      - name: Generate deployment report
        run: |
          echo "Deployment Pipeline Summary"
          echo "==========================="
          echo "Build Status: ${{ needs.build.result }}"
          echo "Staging Deployment: ${{ needs.deploy-staging.result }}"
          echo "Production Deployment: ${{ needs.deploy-production.result }}"
          echo "DR Deployment: ${{ needs.deploy-dr.result }}"
          echo "Version: ${{ needs.build.outputs.version }}"
      
      - name: Send notification
        run: |
          echo "Sending deployment notification"
